mapper.select: SELECT problemInfo.problem_id,problemInfo.problem_title,userInfo.`name` AS user_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( labelInfo.label_content ) FROM t_label_info labelInfo WHERE FIND_IN_SET( labelInfo.label_id, problemInfo.data_label )) AS data_label, problemInfo.create_time,problemTypeItem.item_text AS problem_type,problemInfo.user_id, problemInfo.view_num,IF(ISNULL( problemComment.reply_num ), 0, problemComment.reply_num ) AS reply_num,problemInfo.problem_content FROM t_problem_info problemInfo LEFT JOIN sys_user userInfo ON problemInfo.user_id = userInfo.user_id LEFT JOIN t_dict_item problemTypeItem ON problemInfo.problem_type = problemTypeItem.item_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count(*) AS reply_num, problem_id FROM t_problem_comment WHERE ISNULL( parent_comment_id ) GROUP BY problem_id ) problemComment ON problemInfo.problem_id = problemComment.problem_id WHERE problemInfo.problem_id=#{problemId}

SELECT problemInfo.problem_id,problemInfo.problem_title FROM t_problem_info problemInfo LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count(*) AS reply_num, problem_id FROM t_problem_comment GROUP BY problem_id ) problemComment ON problemInfo.problem_id = problemComment.problem_id WHERE ISNULL(problemComment.reply_num) LIMIT 5

SELECT problemInfo.problem_id,problemInfo.problem_title FROM t_problem_info problemInfo LEFT JOIN ( SELECT problemComment.problem_id,count(*) AS comment_num,sum( problemCommentRecord.like_num ) AS like_num FROM t_problem_comment problemComment LEFT JOIN t_problem_comment_record problemCommentRecord ON problemComment.comment_id = problemCommentRecord.comment_id GROUP BY problemComment.problem_id ) problemComment ON problemInfo.problem_id = problemComment.problem_id ORDER BY problemComment.like_num DESC LIMIT 10
